content: Louis Letrush: You know, I've seen you skulking around the Guild, Sapphire. Got a reputation for keeping shit to yourself. That how you afford those fancy blades? Sapphire: A girl’s gotta eat, Breton. And I don’t share my spoils with anyone who hasn’t earned it—least of all nosy bastards like you. Louis Letrush: Ha! Touchy. Must be hiding more than just gems. What’s the Guildmaster think of your little side projects? Sapphire: You’d do well to shut your fucking mouth before I carve out your tongue and feed it to the skeevers. Louis Letrush: Easy, killer. Just making conversation. Though if you ever want to… your income, I’ve got a little horse problem that could use your particular talents. Sapphire: Ugh, another idiot with a score. Let me guess—you stiffed the wrong merchant, and now you need a thief to clean up your mess? Louis Letrush: Close. Sibbi Black-Briar’s sitting in a cell, holding out on a prize stallion I already paid for. Figured a woman who steals jewels might know how to lift a fucking horse. Sapphire: Tempting. But unless you’re offering me more than just gold—maybe that pretty little blade of yours shoved somewhere fun—I’ll pass. Louis Letrush: Oh, so it’s kind of negotiation. Tell you what—you bring me Frost and his papers, and I’ll give you a ride you won’t forget. Sapphire: Hah! That sad little prick of yours wouldn’t satisfy a skeever. But keep talking, Breton. I do love watching men beg before I ruin them. Louis Letrush: Gods damn, woman. Remind me never to cross you sober. Sapphire: Too late for that. Now get out of my face before I decide to rearrange yours.

Louis Letrush: You win, you vicious little thief. I’ll drink to your cruelty—just don’t stab me when I’m not looking. Sapphire: If I wanted you dead, you’d already be choking on your own blood. Now piss off before I change my mind about the stabbing. Louis Letrush: Right, right. Still gonna find someone to steal that horse… maybe someone with a softer bite. Sapphire: Good luck. The only ones dumber than you are the ones desperate enough to take your gold.

Louis Letrush: Ah, Lydia, still swinging that oversized blade around like a true Nord brute. Tell me, does your Thane ever let you use that mouth for anything besides bitching about elves and swallowing his cock? Lydia: Fuck you, Breton scum. At least my thane’s got real stones, unlike you, hiding in taverns while others do your dirty work. Bet you couldn’t even ride Frost properly—too busy getting fucked by Sibbi in that jail cell. Louis Letrush: Ha! Sibbi’s got better taste than to stick his prick in a muscle-bound shrew like you. Though I hear Draugr love a woman who fights back before they bend her over a tombstone.
